violations.text: Raw beef tips were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods cheese in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025
Gaskets on 2 door prep unit observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solutions for the dishmachines. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025
Grease disposal unit observed stored on grass. Outdoor surfaces for returnables, recyclables or refuse must be easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

Area of ceiling and door frame threshold (top area) in walk-in cooler were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

1. Cutting surfaces on the line observed very scratched 2. Gaskets on 2 door prep unit observed in poor repair Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
Grease disposal unit observed stored on grass. Outdoor surfaces for returnables, recyclables or refuse must be easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
Floors in garage observed with an accumulation of soil residue and old rodent droppings. Physical facilities must be maintained clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2025

Raw eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as in the walk-in refrigerator. Foods were moved into proper storage during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
Working containers of chemicals were not labelled with common name of chemical. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
Raw meat observed thawing in stagnant water. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The presence of large rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings observed in storage garage and exterior of building (pest activity localized to these areas). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment to work with pest control to eliminate pest issue. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024
Food observed on the floor in the garage. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
Single service items observed on the floor in garage. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

1. Cutting surfaces on the line and in kitchen observed very scratched and scored 2. Gaskets on 2 door prep unit observed in poor repair 3. Wooden frame surrounding window observed with black residue Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
Handsink observed leaking into bucket in kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

1. Drain plug was missing at the dumpster 2. Laundry container and grease disposal unit observed stored on grass. Outdoor surfaces for returnables, recyclables or refuse must be easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025
Walls in dish room observed in poor repair (paint observed chipping). New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2025

The floors under 3 bay sink observed with an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the garage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2025
